purpose: Keep stable engineering rules in the scaffold contract and push implementation-specific details down.
instruction: Keep profile semantics and runtime contract fields stable.
Move repo-local output paths and business-specific scripts to the generated skill implementation.
Generate tests and tooling docs whenever scripts are generated.
workflow: Build file content from the selected profile.
Run lint and pytest on the generated skill.
rules: No legacy aliases or mapping layers inside the scaffold output.
No hardcoded result root policy inside the creation template contract.
